channel.title: Wikidata on Christian Mahnke
channel.description: Recent content in Wikidata on Christian Mahnke

item.title: Blog metadata visualised

item.description: About a year ago, I tried visualising the blog content…

item.title: Querying blog metadata via SPARQL
item.author: mail@christianmahnke.de (Christian Mahnke)
item.description: Since the start of 2025, I have been recording additional metadata for the posts on this blog.

item.title: Exhibitions in Wikidata
item.author: mail@christianmahnke.de (Christian Mahnke)
item.description: How can digital objects be linked to exhibitions?

item.title: Authority data for private collections (and small cultural institutions)
item.author: mail@christianmahnke.de (Christian Mahnke)
item.description: Since the beginning of the year, I have been adding Wikidata for various functions on my blogs…

item.title: Simple data enrichment with Wikidata
item.author: mail@christianmahnke.de (Christian Mahnke)

item.title: Wikidata Links in Hugo
